data.title: Hecate Energy Group to hold investor webinar on Feb 5, 2026, at 10AM ET. -  Hecate Energy & EGH Acquisition Corp to discuss operations & strategy.
data.description: Chicago-based company Hecate Energy Group LLC, in collaboration with EGH Acquisition Corp., is set to conduct an investor webinar on February 5, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The webinar aims to introduce Hecate Energy Group LLC, an independent energy infrastructure developer, along with detailing its operations and near-term strategy. EGH Acquisition Corp., listed on NASDAQ under the symbols EGHA, EGHAU, and EGHAR, will be hosting this event.

data.title: Kornit Digital will report Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 11. Innovative textile production tech company.
data.description: In Rosh-Ha'Ayin, Israel, on January 28, 2026, Kornit Digital Ltd. (NASDAQ: KRNT), a leading company in sustainable digital fashion and textile production technologies, revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for Q4 and the full year ending December 31, 2025, on February 11th before market trading begins.

data.title: BriaCell shows tumors regression in metastasized cancer patients with liver, brain involvement. Study details included.
data.description: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp., a clinical-stage biotechnology company listed on both Nasdaq (BCTX, BCTXW, BCTXZ, BCTXL) and TSX (BCT), has recently shared new images showcasing the successful treatment of metastatic breast cancer in patients with lesions in the eye, brain, liver, and spine. The company's Phase 2 study includes survival data on these patients and others, which has been previously disclosed. This development demonstrates the potential of BriaCell's immunotherapies to revolutionize cancer care.

data.title: Monro, Inc. reports $293.4 million sales in Q3 of fiscal 2026, a 4.0% decrease from Q3 fiscal 2025.
data.description: Monro, Inc., a prominent automotive repair and tire services company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol MNRO, has disclosed its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on December 27, 2025. In this period, the company experienced a 4.0% decline in sales, amounting to $293.4 million, compared to $305.8 million in the same quarter of the prior fiscal year that concluded on March 29, 2025. This decrease was mainly attributed to a reduction in...

data.title: WisdomTree now offers its full lineup of tokenized funds on Solana, highlighting its fast transactions in growing its regulated multi-chain selection.
data.description: WisdomTree recently incorporated Solana into its lineup of tokenized funds, highlighting its rapid transaction capabilities. This move is a part of the company's effort to broaden its regulated multi-chain approach and capitalize on Solana's growing popularity within the crypto market. Solana's inclusion reflects WisdomTree's commitment to diversifying its offerings and staying competitive in the rapidly evolving digital asset space.

data.title: Sophisticated trading firms shift focus to on-chain alpha as blockchain infrastructure is acquired for trading advantage.
data.description: High-frequency trading firms are taking over blockchain infrastructure, leading to the end of physical co-location and nanosecond advantages. This shift in ownership is resulting in significant changes in the market's dynamics.

data.title: Ealixir (OTCID: EAXR) issued shareholder letter & corporate update on Jan 28, 2026, specializing in online reputation management.
data.description: In a press release today, Ealixir Inc. (OTCID: EAXR), a prominent internet technology firm focusing on online reputation management services, shared a shareholder letter and corporate update. The company, based in Miami, released this information on January 28, 2026. Ealixir is recognized for its expertise in ORM services, pivotal in maintaining a positive digital presence.

data.title: Biogen's litifilimab granted FDA Breakthrough Therapy Designation for cutaneous lupus erythematosus, a skin autoimmune disease with no targeted treatments. Litifilimab is a humanized IgG1 monoclonal antibody targeting BDCA2.
data.description: Biogen Inc., based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, revealed on January 28, 2026, that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has awarded Breakthrough Therapy Designation for litifilimab (BIIB059) in the treatment of cutaneous lupus erythematosus (CLE). Litifilimab, a pioneering humanized IgG1 monoclonal antibody (mAb) focused on blood dendritic cell antigen 2 (BDCA2), is the first of its kind to target this condition. CLE, a persistent autoimmune disorder impacting the skin, lacks specific treatments currently available.

data.title: Nasdaq eyes record high; Tesla, Microsoft, Meta stocks surge alongside S&P 500; Fed's Powell update anticipated.
data.description: Several stocks showed positive momentum in the market, with the Nasdaq leading the way and the S&P 500 reaching a peak. However, attention is now focused on key players like Tesla, Microsoft, Meta, and Federal Reserve Chair Powell. Dow Jones Futures indicate the Nasdaq is poised to achieve a new record high. Stay tuned for developments on these significant market influences.

data.title: Haaglanden Medical Center in Netherlands installs ZAP-X® Gyroscopic Radiosurgery® System, the first in the country.
data.description: ZAP Surgical Systems, Inc., based in San Carlos, California, revealed that Haaglanden Medical Center (HMC) is set to be the inaugural hospital in the Netherlands to integrate the ZAP-X® Gyroscopic Radiosurgery® platform. This initiative marks a significant milestone as HMC will pioneer the implementation of this innovative system, which is distinguished as vault-free and cobalt-free. By introducing this cutting-edge technology within their radiotherapy department, HMC solidifies its position as a prominent national and regional referral center specializing in intricate neuro-oncology and neurovascular cases.
